Index.meta_description: Support 2000+ local farmers and get the highest quality organic produce delivered within 24 hours.

Hero.title: Fresh From Earth To Your Kitchen
Hero.subtitle: Support 2000+ local farmers and get the highest quality organic produce delivered within 24 hours.

HarvestBanner.title: Grow Your Business with GreenMart
HarvestBanner.subtitle: Join our network of 2,000+ successful farmers and reach thousands of customers every day.
HarvestBanner.top_farmer: Stev Howards | Top Farmer of the Month
HarvestBanner.top_farmer_desc: Achieved 500+ successful deliveries with stellar ratings.

SustainabilityStats.title: Growing a Greener Tomorrow
SustainabilityStats.desc: We're more than a marketplace. We're a precision agriculture platform connecting you directly to the source, reducing carbon footprints and ensuring fair pay for those who feed us.

Newsletter.title: Stay Updated with GreenMart
Newsletter.desc: Get weekly recipes, farmer stories, and exclusive discounts delivered to your inbox.
Newsletter.privacy_note: We respect your privacy. Unsubscribe at any time.

About.meta_description: Learn more about GreenMart, our mission to support local farmers, and our sustainable agricultural marketplace.
About.about_paragraph: GreenMart is a precision agriculture platform and marketplace. We connect consumers directly to verified local farmers, promoting sustainability and fresh organic produce.

SignIn.meta_description: Seamlessly sign in to your account with our user-friendly login process.
SignIn.sign_in_subtitle: Sign in to your GreenMart account

SignUp.meta_description: Join the global community of sustainable farmers and ethical buyers.
SignUp.left_subtitle: Join the global community of sustainable farmers and ethical buyers. Our platform brings precision technology to organic agriculture.
SignUp.trusted_desc: Over 50k verified agricultural specialists already on board.
SignUp.organic_desc: We ensure all products meet the highest sustainability standards.
SignUp.create_account_subtitle: Start your journey with GreenMart today.
SignUp.terms_agree: I agree to the <tos>Terms of Service</tos> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>.

ResetPassword.meta_description: Enter your email to receive a password reset link.
ResetPassword.reset_password_subtitle: Enter your email to receive a password reset link.
ResetPassword.set_new_password_subtitle: Please enter and confirm your new password below.

VerifyEmail.meta_description: Verify your email to sprout your journey. We've sent a code to your inbox.
VerifyEmail.title: Verify your email
VerifyEmail.subtitle: Verify your email to sprout your journey. We've sent a code to your inbox.
VerifyEmail.success_meta_description: Verification complete. Your account is ready for harvest.
VerifyEmail.success_subtitle: Your account is ready for harvest.
